creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 169729
patch with update to 8.0.0

Hello,

attached a patch for bring the port to its current version 8.0.0.

Buildtests are done for 9.3, 10.0, 10.2 and 10.3 amd64 and i386. Also a short runtime test on irb was successful.

This update is also needed for the upcoming update of www/gitlab. ;)

Greetings,
Torsten
